channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Perspex broken, 25th April
item.description:
Perspex is broken, outside sofas & stuff Stop is called Holy Trinity Church (heading towards Pittville Street)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31-39, Portland Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac pavement breaking up due to weeds., 25th April
item.description:
Outside no. 44 Brookfield Road. Weeds are gradually breaking up the pavement. It's been getting gradually worse since we moved in 8 years ago. We can manually remove the weeds but the pavement is still being damaged every time they grow back through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Bafford Lane, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Litter on pavement and street, 24th April
item.description:
Not helped by lack of bins in area including none by Co Op

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop shelter, 24th April
item.description:
Sign missing on one side. No digital display, timetable 3 years out of date. Is this correct please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Charlton Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy road, 24th April
item.description:
Zero street cleaning since road resurfacing in 2023. Please clean our street. We pay huge rates on our homes in Prestbury Road and Pittville Crescent Lane; many homes are in G rates bracket.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Pittville Crescent Lane, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not emptied, 24th April
item.description:
The poo bin and street bins have not been emptied for several weeks. This is often happening since the system has changed. They need to be emptied regularly as wild animals such as squirrels and magpies keep pulling litter out of the bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad pothole repair, 24th April
item.description:
At the entrance of the road at the back entrance to 3 Prestbury Road, on Pittville Crescent Lane, the road has collapsed. There was a bad repair earlier this week. Also, there are two sunken drains approximately 100 yards further down the road, causing cars to dip and swerve towards walls built directly onto the tarmac roadway. PLEASE lift drains urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Pittville Crescent Lane, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs
